homeBannerTitle: {strikes} days under 50% in the last fortnight
homeBannerBody: The list got too long. Pare it back so the streak can breathe — less is more.
heroTitle: It's not failure. The list got too big.
heroBody: Three days under 50% means the design is wrong, not you. The compound effect only works on habits you actually finish — so let some go for now.
principleBody: The Prophet ﷺ said the most beloved deeds to Allah are the most consistent, even if small. Keep the few you'll do today. You can always add more later when these are automatic.
chooseBody: Tap a habit to drop it. The ones still ticked will be your shorter list. Dropped habits and their logs are removed — by design, this is a fresh start.
noHabits: No daily habits to pare. Add some, give them a couple of weeks, then come back if you over-committed.
summaryWarning: Dropping a habit also removes its history. The streak is gone with it.
confirm: Drop {n} habits and reset the slate?
